question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
भारत के सभी जिलों की वर्णानुक्रमित सूची प्रदान करें, जो उनके संबंधित राज्यों के अनुसार व्यवस्थित हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name, s.state_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN dim_country c ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE c.country_name ILIKE 'india'
ORDER BY s.state_name, d.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name, s.state_name
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_state s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN dim_country c ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE c.country_name ILIKE 'india'
ORDER BY s.state_name, d.district_name;

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    s.SUB_DISTRICT_ID,
    s.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fcis.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) AS total_vitamin_a_doses
FROM 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED fcis

    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID

gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_1), SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.type_of_area,
    SUM(f.rotavirus_1) AS total_rotavirus_1,
    SUM(f.vitamin_a_dose_1) AS total_vitamin_a_1
FROM 
    fact_child_immunization_specialized f
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district d ON f.sub_district_id = d.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month m ON f.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE 
    y.year_value = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    d.type_of_area;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.type_of_area,
    SUM(f.rotavirus_1) AS total_rotavirus_1,
    SUM(f.vitamin_a_dose_1) AS total_vitamin_a_1
FROM 
    fact_child_immunization_specialized f
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district d ON f.sub_district_id = d.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month m ON f.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE 
    y.year_value = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    d.type_of_area;

उन उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों की पहचान करें जहां सितंबर 2020 के दौरान पांच से अधिक गर्भवती महिलाओं में हीमोग्लोबिन का स्तर 11 से नीचे दर्ज किया गया था।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.MONTH_VALUE = 'September, 2020' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2020' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 5

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
उन ग्रामीण उप-जिलों की सूची बनाएं जिन्होंने 5,000 से अधिक कंडोम वितरित किए हैं, उच्चतम से निम्नतम वितरण मात्रा के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध किया गया।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 5000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC

question: कुल मौखिक गोली चक्र और 2021 में वितरित कंडोम का विवरण प्रदान करें, क्षेत्र के प्रकार के अनुसार वर्गीकृत किया गया।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
सभी ग्रामीण उप-जिलों की पहचान करें, विशेष रूप से उन्हें उजागर करें जहां 500 से अधिक गर्भवती महिलाओं में हीमोग्लोबिन का स्तर 11 से नीचे दर्ज किया गया था।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) > 500 UNION SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
सभी ग्रामीण उप-जिलों के आईडी और नाम प्रदान करें, जिसमें उनके मूल जिला आईडी भी शामिल हों।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question:
इस प्रश्न का अनुवाद करें:
वर्ष 2021 के दौरान कौन से उप-जिलों में ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों में गर्भवती महिलाओं के हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से नीचे होने के मामले सामने आए, लेकिन शहरी क्षेत्रों में ऐसे कोई मामले नहीं थे?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
उन उप-जिलों की पहचान करें जो या तो ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों के रूप में वर्गीकृत हैं या जहाँ 11 से नीचे हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर वाली 38 से अधिक गर्भवती महिलाओं की सूचना मिली है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 38.0 OR T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'

question:

question: 2021 में मौखिक गोली चक्रों और वितरित कंडोमों का विवरण प्रदान करें, क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार, सक्रिय वितरण वाले क्षेत्रों में गोली वितरण की मात्रा के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध।

question: किन पांच ग्रामीण उप-जिलों ने 2021 में रोटावायरस 3 टीकाकरण की सर्वाधिक कुल संख्या दर्ज की?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.ROTAVIRUS_3) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT sub.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(fact.ROTAVIRUS_3) AS total_rotavirus3
FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED fact
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sub ON fact.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sub.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH month ON fact.MONTH_ID = month.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR year ON month.YEAR_ID = year.YEAR_ID
WHERE year.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND sub.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
GROUP BY sub.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, sub.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY total_rotavirus3 DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT sub.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(fact.ROTAVIRUS_3) AS total_rotavirus3
FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED fact
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sub ON fact.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sub.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH month ON fact.MONTH_ID = month.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR year ON month.YEAR_ID = year.YEAR_ID
WHERE year.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
AND sub.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
GROUP BY sub.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, sub.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY total_rotavirus3 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: कौन से ग्रामीण उप-जिलों में वर्ष 2021 के दौरान कम से कम एक गर्भवती महिला ने प्रसवपूर्व देखभाल के लिए पंजीकरण कराया था?

SELECT DISTINCT ds.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
2021 के दौरान प्रसवपूर्व देखभाल के लिए पंजीकृत गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या और चार या अधिक जांच प्राप्त करने वाली महिलाओं की औसत दर का क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार विवरण प्रदान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), AVG(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(fmat.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) AS total_registered,
    ROUND(SUM(fmat.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) / SUM(fmat.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) * 100, 2) AS average_rate
FROM
